receipts.public_safe_summary: Warp Stable 0.2026.06.24.09.19.02 crashed during fullscreen tab/window transfer on 2026-06-29.
receipts.absorbed_lesson: Use a plain window and avoid fullscreen tab transfer during sustained autonomous runs.
receipts.staged_contribution: Bug-report receipt staged with the public-safe crash signature and recovery lesson.
receipts.private_evidence_ref: Local crash report stays outside tracked docs; no raw crash body is committed.
